commands.review_summary:
The PR adds cron quick-create model input and datalist wiring, maps the selected value into `payloadModel`, and displays configured/default agent-turn models in cron list and detail views with focused tests.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +70. Total +125 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main lacks quick-create model state/input/mapping and omits model/default labels in cron job rows/details while the advanced form already supports `payloadModel`. I did not run a live browser reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor real behavior proof and draft readiness; there is no narrow code defect for an automated repair job.

target.title: fix(ui): show cron job model selection
target.body:
Related: #93507

## What Problem This Solves
Fixes an issue where users creating cron jobs from the Web UI quick-create flow could not choose a model, and existing cron jobs did not make their configured/default model visible in the job list/details.

## Why This Change Was Made
This reuses the existing cron `payload.model` / Control UI `payloadModel` contract instead of adding runtime or schema behavior. The quick-create wizard now accepts the same model suggestions already loaded for the advanced cron form, maps the selected value into the cron form patch, and scheduled agent jobs show either the configured model or an explicit default label in both the row chips and job detail section.

## User Impact
Users can choose a model while creating a cron job from the guided Web UI flow, and can inspect scheduled agent jobs at a glance to see which model they will use. Jobs that use the default model now say so explicitly.

## Evidence
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/cron-quick-create.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/cron.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/cron.test.ts` passed: 3 files, 60 tests.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/app-render.ts ui/src/ui/views/cron-quick-create.ts ui/src/ui/views/cron.ts ui/src/ui/views/cron-quick-create.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/cron.test.ts` passed.
- `python .agents\skills\autoreview\scripts\autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` passed with `autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`.
- Mocked Control UI / Playwright proof passed with the real Vite Control UI, a mocked Gateway, and system Chrome. Proof JSON: https://gist.github.com/ly85206559/d24a74e8dd7818dc34c1da6ba7d66a24
- Playwright proof confirmed the existing cron row and detail both show `Model: openai/gpt-5.2` for an agentTurn job.
- Playwright proof confirmed the quick-create How step accepts `openai/gpt-5.5` and the captured `cron.add` request includes `payload.model: openai/gpt-5.5`.
- Playwright proof reported `pageErrors: []`.
- Local visual artifacts generated for inspection: `.artifacts/control-ui-e2e/cron-model-proof/01-job-list-model.png`, `.artifacts/control-ui-e2e/cron-model-proof/02-quick-create-model.png`, and `.artifacts/control-ui-e2e/cron-model-proof/page@5d408e05bab85b27a18d6dd4d4094162.webm`.
target.author: ly85206559
